debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
δL : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → ℝ
hδL0 : δL 0 = 0
h : ClassicalMechanics.Lagrangian.IsTotalTimeDerivative n fun x v x_1 => δL v
⊢ ∃ g, ∀ (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), δL v = inner ℝ g v

failed_attempts:
rcases h with ⟨F, -, hF⟩
  let D := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  use (toDual ℝ _).symm (D.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ _ ℝ))
  intro v
  rw [toDual_symm_apply]
  trans D (v, 0)
  · specialize hF 0 v 0; dsimp at hF
    rw [hF, show (v, (1 : ℝ)) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) by ext <;> simp, map_add, add_right_eq_self]
    specialize hF 0 0 0; dsimp at hF
    rwa [hδL0, eq_comm] at hF
  · rfl
